task_completion.description: Set the number of street address lines to 3
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Configuration > Customers > Customer Configuration), look for the 'Name and Address Options' section. The 'Number of Lines in a Street Address' dropdown should be set to '3'.

task_completion.description: Make Tax/VAT Number a mandatory field
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Name and Address Options' section, the 'Show Tax/VAT Number' dropdown must be set to 'Required'.

task_completion.description: Make Date of Birth a mandatory field
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Name and Address Options' section, the 'Show Date of Birth' dropdown must be set to 'Required'.

task_completion.description: Set the account creation Email Sender to 'Customer Support'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Create New Account Options' section, the 'Email Sender' dropdown must be set to 'Customer Support'.

task_completion.description: Enforce a minimum password length of 10
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Password Options' section, the 'Minimum Password Length' text input field must contain the value '10'.

task_completion.description: Enforce 4 required character classes for passwords
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Password Options' section, the 'Number of Required Character Classes' text input field must contain the value '4'.
Look for a green success banner at the top of the page stating 'You saved the configuration.' or evidence that the 'Save Config' button was clicked and the page reloaded with the new values intact.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Magento web interface being navigated and interacted with, rather than terminal commands (like magento bin/magento config:set) or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Magento application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser should display the authentic Magento 2 Admin panel with standard menus, headers, and configuration layouts, not a mock HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success message or field values
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer console open showing DOM manipulation to artificially display the success banner or alter dropdown text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Magento 2 configuration verification: 'Number of Lines in a Street Address' must be '3'. 'Show Tax/VAT Number' and 'Show Date of Birth' must both be set to 'Required' (internally 'req'). 'Email Sender' must be 'Customer Support' (internally 'support'). 'Minimum Password Length' must be '10' and 'Number of Required Character Classes' must be '4'. All these settings are found in the Magento Admin under Stores > Configuration > Customers > Customer Configuration.
